chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2700 - وَ سَأَلَهُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَعْبَثُ بِلِحْيَتِهِ فَيَسْقُطُ مِنْهَا اَلشَّعْرَةُ وَ اَلثِّنْتَانِ قَالَ «يُطْعِمُ شَيْئاً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2700 - He was asked about a person in the state of ihram who fiddles with their beard, causing one or two hairs to fall out.
Imam (as) said: "They must give some food as expiation."
